title: Mananthes kampotiana
taxonomy: Mananthes kampotiana is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Cambodia and Vietnam. Mananthes kampotiana is a type of shrub or small tree that belongs to the order Gentianales. This plant is a member of the genus Mananthes, which consists of a few species of flowering plants. Mananthes kampotiana is often found in tropical forests, where it grows in well-drained soils and partial shade.
uses: Mananthes kampotiana is a plant species native to Cambodia, and it has been used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits.
